title: HIV+ CARE COORDINATION - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE JACKSON COUNTY HIV+ CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers work with HIV-positive clients to develop care plans that support the client's ability to sustain self-care. Care coordination services may include medical and pharmacy case management, respite care, in-home support services, benefits and health insurance advocacy, meals, and emergency financial assistance. Referrals may also be provided for social services, housing, dental, mental health and addictions treatment, employment, and financial planning. 955 Town Center Drive Suite B Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV. Emergency financial assistance is limited to clients below 300% of the federal poverty level. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 370 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 ext 370 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email intake coordinator FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID, proof of Oregon residence, diagnosis confirmation, proof of income, proof of health insurance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE JACKSON COUNTY
